items.question: How to add TikTok voiceovers to videos using our AI voice over generator?
items.answer: To add professional TikTok voiceovers to your videos: 1) Generate your voice over using our advanced AI voice over generator 2) Download the high-quality audio file 3) Open TikTok and tap the + button to create a new video 4) Record or upload your video footage 5) Tap "Voice-over" in the editing panel 6) Import your AI-generated voice over file 7) Adjust timing and volume levels for perfect sync 8) Add background music or sound effects if desired 9) Preview to ensure seamless voice over integration 10) Save and post your video with professional TikTok voiceover.
